description: Golden Stage -> Song usage stream for the same service as stage-to-rec-cues.json. One usage event per service item, the first time it is shown (the shown-items guard prevents double-logging when the operator advances within or scrubs back to a song). idempotency_key follows the contract formula usage:<church>:<item>:<date> and excludes the variant, so re-keying a song mid-service collapses to one event. Mirrors the UsageEvent contract posted to SundaySong /v1/usage/log.
